message:
feat: implement dlopen-based dynamic loading for Python C extensions

Replace static module registry with proper dlopen implementation:
- loadSharedLibraryWithName now uses std.DynLib.open() to load .so files
- tryLoadExtension builds proper paths and uses dlopen
- tryLoadPackageExtension uses dlopen for package extensions
- Cache loaded libraries to avoid reloading
- Fall back to static registry if dlopen fails

This enables metal0 to load ANY Python extension library (numpy, pandas,
scipy, etc.) at runtime without requiring hardcoded support for each.
